basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for JRF, Research Associate and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 is now open for 6 Research Associate-III, Software Developer, Field Worker and Junior Research Fellow posts for candidates with PhD, ME/M.Tech, BE/B.Tech, MCA, B.Sc or BCA with relevant experience, with email applications accepted until 23-05-2026 through the official website nitrkl.ac.in.
